## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss HeyGen's content strategy, SEO improvements, and agency outreach plans.](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prioritizing content creation for e-learning, marketing, and agency audiences](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Implementing technical SEO improvements, including site structure and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Expanding blog post production to include marketing-focused content alongside e-learning](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Launching tools directory page with at least 15 entries by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Focusing on non-branded terms relevant to HeyGen's current capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)
  - [Targeting keywords: AI video generation, video translation, e-learning course localization](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Expanding into marketing-related content (e.g., video marketing for specific industries)](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Considering agent-specific tutorials for middle/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Fatima presented gap analysis revealing opportunities in video marketing content](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Technical SEO Improvements

  - [Implementing HTML sitemap to improve indexing and ranking](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Enhancing internal linking structure, especially for important pages](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1367.0)
  - [Cleaning up sitemap for better crawlability](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Pursuing backlink opportunities, particularly with high-authority partners like HubSpot](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1528.0)

### Blog Post Production

  - [Currently publishing 3 e-learning posts per week (Tue, Wed, Fri)](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Adding 2 marketing-focused posts per week (Mon, Thu) starting next week](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Seeing initial traction with e-learning blog posts after 1.5 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)

### Tools Directory

  - [Aiming to launch with at least 15 entries to allow for filtering](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Adding tags for better categorization](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)
  - [Team to review content accuracy and potentially create missing GIFs/visuals](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### Agency Outreach

  - [Refining list of potential agency contacts using Apollo for keyword-based filtering](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1180.0)
  - [Planning to target video marketing agencies specifically](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Considering CTAs and user journey for agency program exploration](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch tools directory page by end of week with 15+ entries](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=838.0)
  - [Start producing 2 marketing-focused blog posts weekly from next week](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1726.0)
  - [Implement technical SEO improvements (sitemap, internal linking)](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Pursue backlink exchange with HubSpot, focusing on AI avatar video creation](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
  - [Review and apply edits to existing articles for publication by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Coordinate with engineering team on sitemap implementation](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Refine agency outreach list and strategy](https://fathom.video/share/JfXZfSneTUDGuMoGpW22Boqb2gezm_dJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1659.0)
